gsa_schedule.name: GSA Multiple Award Schedule (MAS)
gsa_schedule.description: Base requirement for most federal contracting. Gateway to government sales.
gsa_schedule.howToGet: Apply at GSA eOffer. 6-12 month process. Need 2 years commercial sales history.

idiq_vehicles.name: Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ)
idiq_vehicles.description: Pre-competed contract vehicles for specific services/products.
idiq_vehicles.howToGet: Watch SAM.gov for solicitations. Highly competitive, requires past performance.

bpa.name: Blanket Purchase Agreement (BPA)
bpa.howToGet: Usually awarded from GSA Schedule or open competition.

seaport.name: SeaPort-NxG
seaport.description: Navy IDIQ for professional services, engineering, and technical support.
seaport.howToGet: Apply during open enrollment periods. Requires Navy-relevant past performance.
benefits: Direct access to Navy task orders

new_contractor: Start with SAM.gov registration and GSA Schedule application
Focus on set-asides if eligible (8(a), WOSB, SDVOSB, HUBZone)
Build past performance through subcontracting first
Get capability statement reviewed before marketing
established_contractor: Position for IDIQ vehicle competitions (OASIS+, CIO-SP4, etc.)
Attend Industry Days for target agencies
Build prime relationships for teaming on large contracts
Maintain CMMC certification for defense work
certification_seeking: 8(a) certification through SBA for socially/economically disadvantaged
SDVOSB verification through VA for veteran-owned
WOSB certification through SBA or third-party certifiers
HUBZone certification for businesses in designated areas
